overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg Emerging Markets Local Bond ETF (EBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of fixed-rate, local-currency sovereign debt from emerging-market countries. Holdings must have a year or more remaining in maturity. EBND was launched on Feb 23, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Bloomberg Emerging Market Local Currency Government Diversified
